findings.title: Markdown link points to a missing heading anchor

evidence.currentFact: `docs/guide.md` exists, but it only defines the `#guide` and `#usage` anchors.

findings.suggestedAction: Change the link to an existing heading or add an `Install` heading to docs/guide.md.

findings.title: Documented image path does not exist

evidence.currentFact: `docs/images/missing-flow.png` is not present in the fixture file tree.

findings.suggestedAction: Add the missing image or remove the stale screenshot reference.

findings.title: Source env var is not documented
findings.suggestedAction: Document STRIPE_API_KEY in setup docs or .env.example, or remove the unused source reference.
